name: Deel
tagline: Global payroll and compliance for remote teams
description: Hire, pay, and manage global teams with compliance
pros: Global contractor management in 150+ countries with local compliance
EOR hiring eliminating entity setup costs for international expansion
Automated payroll with multi-currency and multi-country runs
Built-in contract templates compliant with local labor laws
Real-time compliance monitoring and entity recommendations
cons: $49/contractor/month minimum pricing for core EOR service
Full EOR costs $599/month per employee vs local entity payroll
Onboarding time 2-5 days per contractor for compliance checks

content.title: Executive Summary
content.body: Hire, pay, and manage global teams with compliance Deel earns a 4.4/5 rating from 8,600 user reviews.

content.title: TL;DR
content.body: Deel is a leading hr & payroll platform rated 4.4/5 across 8,600 reviews. Pricing starts at $49/contractor/mo. Best for Remote Teams and HR Teams.

content.title: Rating Overview
content.body: Deel scores 4.4/5 overall with ease of use (4.3/5), features (4.3/5), performance (4.2/5), support (4/5), value (4.2/5).

content.title: Quick Verdict
content.body: Deel earns a 4.4/5 rating recommended for Remote Teams and HR Teams. Delivers strong feature depth with intuitive interface.

content.title: Company Background
content.body: Deel was founded in 2019 in San Francisco, USA, serving 25,000+ customers with 3,000+ employees.

content.title: Product Overview
content.body: Deel is a global payroll and compliance for remote teams. Provides 18 features across Core, Compliance, Advanced, Integrations, Analytics, Mobile categories. Mobile on iOS and Android. API available.

content.title: Key Features
content.body: Essential hr & payroll features:
items: Expense Management: Receipt tracking and reimbursement.

content.title: Feature Deep Dive
content.body: Global Payroll. Multi-country payroll processing. Contractor Management. Compliant international hiring. EOR. Employer of Record service.

content.title: AI Features
content.body: Deel AI includes AI contract generation, Compliance alerts, Entity recommendation.

content.title: API & Automation
content.body: Deel provides a comprehensive API for custom integration and workflow automation.

content.title: Security
content.body: Deel holds SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, GDPR, HIPAA certifications with TLS 1.2+ and AES-256 encryption.

content.title: Compliance
content.body: Deel complies with GDPR, CCPA, HIPAA, SOC 2 regulations.

content.title: Integrations
content.body: Integrates with QuickBooks, Xero, Slack, HubSpot, Salesforce, Rippling, Gusto, BambooHR, and 2+ more.

content.title: Pricing
content.body: Deel uses per-contractor monthly subscription. Free trial available. Plans from $49/contractor/mo.

content.title: Pros
content.body: Deel advantages:
items: Global contractor management in 150+ countries with local compliance
EOR hiring eliminating entity setup costs for international expansion
Automated payroll with multi-currency and multi-country runs
Built-in contract templates compliant with local labor laws

content.title: Cons
content.body: Considerations:
items: $49/contractor/month minimum pricing for core EOR service
Full EOR costs $599/month per employee vs local entity payroll
Onboarding time 2-5 days per contractor for compliance checks

content.title: Performance
content.body: Adequate performance for most use cases.

content.title: Ease of Use
content.body: Deel has a low learning curve with intuitive interface.

content.title: User Experience
content.body: Streamlined modern interface.

content.title: Customer Support
content.body: Support rated 4/5 via email and knowledge base.

content.title: Industry Fit
content.body: Best for HR and Payroll with Remote Teams and HR Teams teams.

content.title: Team Size Fit
content.body: Deel accommodates teams of all sizes. Best ROI for 5-50 person teams.

content.title: Real Use Cases
content.body: A remote teams team uses Deel to streamline hr & payroll workflows and improve team productivity.

content.title: Competitor Analysis
content.body: Deel competes with other platforms. Primary differentiators: feature depth and ease of use.

content.title: Alternatives
content.body: Consider alternatives based on specific team requirements.

content.title: Migration Guide
content.body: Migration rated moderate complexity. Budget 2-4 weeks for full transition. Parallel testing recommended.

content.title: Buying Advice
content.body: Evaluate: feature alignment, total cost at $49/contractor/mo, migration effort (2-4 weeks), and real-data trial.

content.title: Final Verdict
content.body: Deel earns 4.4/5. Strong choice for Remote Teams and HR Teams. Recommended for teams prioritizing hr & payroll.
